title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and server to pull, build, and run large language models locally (Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, etc.) with a simple REST API.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama: chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage models with async support.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node, Deno, and browsers; chat, generate, pull, and stream responses.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama models as LLM, chat, and embeddings components.

title: llama-index-integrations-llms-ollama
summary: LlamaIndex LLM and embeddings connectors for Ollama; enables RAG pipelines with local models.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Open-source ChatGPT-style web interface for Ollama; manage models, chats, documents, and users in one place.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent API, streaming, and Android compatibility.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem wrapping Ollama’s REST API with native streaming and async support.

title: ollama-cli-crystal
summary: Crystal-lang CLI and library for chatting with Ollama models interactively or in scripts.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Official Docker images and compose stacks (CPU, CUDA, ROCm) for easy local deployment.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension bringing local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot-style inline suggestions.

title: ollama-chatbot-ui
summary: Minimal Next.js chatbot UI wired to Ollama via streaming fetch; dark mode and markdown support.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models using slash commands.

title: ollama-telegram
summary: Lightweight Telegram bot forwarding messages to Ollama and streaming replies back to users.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaChatGenerator components for pipelines.

title: ollama-curl-examples
summary: Official curl and JSON snippets showing how to use every Ollama REST endpoint without SDKs.

title: ollama-model-library
summary: Community-curated Modelfile definitions for 150+ models (Llama 3, Phi-3, Gemma, etc.) ready to pull.

title: ollama-rag-langchain-streamlit
summary: End-to-end RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Llama 3, LangChain, Chroma, and Streamlit.

title: ollama-experiments
summary: Official LangChain example notebooks showing agents, retrieval, and tool use with Ollama models.
